app.title: SurfMarket
app.meta_description: Find the best water sports teachers and classes

legal.policies_desc: Please read our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy carefully before using SurfMarket.

cookie.message: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking 'Accept', you consent to our use of cookies.

about.title: About SurfMarket
about.subtitle: Your bridge to the perfect wave.
about.what_is_desc: SurfMarket is a digital marketplace connecting passionate water sports enthusiasts with experienced instructors. Whether you are catching your very first wave, paddling out on a kayak, or learning to windsurf, our platform provides a safe and easy way to find the right class for your skill level.
about.how_works_desc: Students can seamlessly browse through available classes filtering by location, difficulty level, and class type. Once you find the perfect match, you can book it instantly. For instructors, SurfMarket provides a streamlined dashboard to manage advertisements, track earnings, and coordinate with pupils.
about.mission_desc: We aim to democratize access to high-quality water sports education by creating a transparent, community-driven platform where instructors can thrive and students can learn safely.

home.hero_desc: Connect with professional water sports teachers and book your next adventure.
home.step1_desc: Browse our marketplace to find the perfect instructor for your skill level.
home.step2_desc: Choose a time that works for you and secure your spot instantly.
home.step3_desc: Meet your instructor at the beach and improve your skills.
home.default_bio: Certified instructor ready to help you hit the waves. Book a session today to improve your skills!

policies.title: Policies & Terms
policies.privacy_1_desc: When you use SurfMarket, we collect information that you provide to us directly, such as your name, email address, and payment information when you book a surf class. We also collect data regarding your usage of the platform to improve our services.
policies.privacy_2_desc: We use the information we collect to facilitate bookings between users and surf instructors, process payments, and communicate with you about your account and upcoming classes.
policies.privacy_3_desc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
policies.terms_1_desc: By accessing and using SurfMarket, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
policies.terms_2_desc: All bookings are subject to availability. Cancellation policies, refunds, and rescheduling are determined independently by each instructor. Please contact your instructor directly to understand their specific cancellation and refund policy.
policies.terms_3_desc: SurfMarket acts solely as a marketplace connecting students with independent surf instructors. Surf instructors are independent contractors, and SurfMarket is not liable for any injuries, damages, or losses incurred during classes.
policies.behavior_desc: Users are expected to maintain respectful behavior towards instructors and other students. Any form of harassment, discrimination, or abusive behavior may result in immediate suspension or termination of your account.
policies.communications_desc: All communications between students and instructors must be conducted through the platform's messaging system. Sharing personal contact information to circumvent platform bookings is strictly prohibited.
policies.payments_desc: All payments for classes and subscriptions are securely processed through our authorized payment gateways. SurfMarket is not responsible for any direct transactions made outside of the platform.

levels.title: Difficulty Levels
levels.subtitle: Understand the 9-tier difficulty scale used for classes.
levels.level_1_desc: Complete beginner. No prior experience with the skill. Learning the absolute basics and familiarizing with the environment and equipment.
levels.level_2_desc: Understands the basic fundamentals. Can perform simple, controlled movements in a highly controlled, beginner-friendly setting.
levels.level_3_desc: Gaining confidence and consistency. Linking basic techniques together and starting to explore slightly more varied situations.
levels.level_4_desc: Comfortable with core skills. Able to handle standard, easy scenarios independently and beginning to refine technique.
levels.level_5_desc: Solid foundation. Able to adapt techniques to moderate challenges and perform with consistency without constant supervision.
levels.level_6_desc: Highly confident in standard situations. Starting to explore advanced techniques and challenging environments.
levels.level_7_desc: Strong technical proficiency. Confident in complex and variable conditions, able to adapt quickly and effectively.
levels.level_8_desc: Highly skilled and experienced. Confident in almost all situations, including highly challenging or technical environments.
levels.level_9_desc: Master-level control. Exceptional proficiency, able to handle extreme conditions and execute with perfect precision.

gear_guide.title: Beginner Water Sports Gear Guide
gear_guide.subtitle: Everything you need to know before hitting the water.
gear_guide.wetsuit_desc: The Cantabrian Sea can be chilly! To stay warm and comfortable during your lesson, choosing the right wetsuit is critical.
gear_guide.wetsuit_summer: Summer (July - September): A 3/2mm or 4/3mm wetsuit is perfect. The water is around 20°C (68°F).
gear_guide.wetsuit_spring: Spring/Autumn: A solid 4/3mm wetsuit is highly recommended.
gear_guide.wetsuit_winter: Winter: You will definitely need a 5/4/3mm suit along with booties and a hood!
gear_guide.wetsuit_footer: Most of our instructors will provide a wetsuit as part of the class, but if you're renting gear on your own, always ask the shop for the appropriate thickness based on the season.
gear_guide.boards_desc: If you are just starting out, the board you choose will make or break your first experience.
gear_guide.boards_foam: Foam Boards (Soft-tops): These are the ultimate beginner boards. They are highly buoyant, making it incredibly easy to catch waves and stand up. Plus, their soft material prevents injuries if you happen to wipe out and get hit by the board.
gear_guide.boards_hard: Hard Boards (Fiberglass/Epoxy): These are for intermediate to advanced surfers. They are faster and more maneuverable but offer less buoyancy and stability. Wait until you can comfortably stand and turn on a foam board before upgrading!
gear_guide.essentials_desc: Don't forget a strong leash to keep your board attached to you, and a fresh coat of surf wax on the top of the board to keep your feet from slipping off!
gear_guide.accessories_desc: Beyond your board and wetsuit, there are a few other items you'll need.
gear_guide.accessories_leash: Leash: Your lifeline. Always wear it so you don't lose your board or hit someone else.
gear_guide.accessories_wax: Surf Wax: Applied to the top of hard boards for grip. Make sure you get the right wax for the water temperature!
gear_guide.sun_protection_desc: The sun is significantly stronger when reflecting off the ocean.
gear_guide.sun_protection_zinc: Zinc / Surf Sunscreen: Regular sunscreen washes off. Use waterproof zinc oxide on your face.
gear_guide.sun_protection_rashguard: Rashguard: If you are surfing in warm water without a wetsuit, a rashguard provides UV protection and prevents board rash.
gear_guide.rentals_desc: Get the best gear from our trusted local partners before you hit the water.
gear_guide.paddle_desc: Stand-up paddleboarding requires a larger, more buoyant board. Look for a stable touring or all-around SUP and an adjustable paddle that reaches about 6-8 inches above your head.
gear_guide.kayak_desc: Always wear a well-fitted Personal Flotation Device (PFD). For coastal kayaking, a sit-on-top kayak is highly recommended for beginners as it's unsinkable and easy to re-enter.
gear_guide.snorkel_desc: A good mask that seals properly without leaking is crucial. Pair it with a dry-top snorkel to prevent water from entering, and comfortable fins for efficient swimming.

instructor_guide.title: Instructor Guide
instructor_guide.subtitle: Welcome to Surfmarket! Discover how our platform works and learn how to maximize your visibility to attract more students.
instructor_guide.subscriptions_desc: We offer flexible subscription tiers to suit your needs:
instructor_guide.basic_desc: Start your journey on Surfmarket for free. Create your profile, list your standard surfing classes, and start receiving inquiries directly from students.
instructor_guide.premium_desc: Unlock advanced profile features. You get the Premium badge, the ability to add external booking links, and priority placement in standard searches.
instructor_guide.pass_desc: The ultimate package. Get everything in Premium, plus introductory video uploads, advanced 'Available Today' badge toggling, and discounted visibility bumps.
instructor_guide.bump_desc1: Want immediate visibility? For just €2, you can 'bump' your advert to the absolute top of the marketplace list for 24 hours.
instructor_guide.bump_desc2: How the cycle works: If another instructor bumps their advert after you, they will take the #1 spot, and you will move to #2. Every hour, bumped adverts gradually decay down the list by one position to ensure fairness and rotation.
instructor_guide.iotw_desc1: Our most exclusive visibility feature. For €20, your profile will be featured directly on the Home Page in our 3-slot grid.
instructor_guide.iotw_desc2: This is highly recommended during peak season as the Home Page receives the highest traffic volume on the platform.
instructor_guide.verified_desc: Verify your email address to get the blue checkmark next to your name, proving to students that you are a legitimate instructor.
instructor_guide.available_desc: A badge you can toggle on your dashboard (Requires Summer Pass) to signal to last-minute bookers that you have open slots right now.
instructor_guide.video_desc: Upload a YouTube link to your profile to let students meet you before they book.
instructor_guide.link_desc: Direct students to your own external scheduling software.
instructor_guide.share_desc: Help other instructors discover Surfmarket by sharing this page!

geolocation.policy_desc: We use your location to show the nearest surf conditions and classes. This calculation is done in your browser and we do not store your location on our servers. You can opt out at any time from your profile.
geolocation.toggle_desc: Allow SurfMarket to calculate your location for localized weather and class recommendations.
geolocation.active_toast: Geolocation is currently active. You can disable it anytime in your Profile.
